item.title: दर्शकः
item.description:  { let quoteId = module_main.default.query.getParam("quoteId"); showQuote(quoteId); } function showQuote(quoteId) { if (quoteId) { let includeElement = document.querySelector("#quoteInclude"); let newUrl = includeElement.getAttribute("url"); newUrl = newUrl.replace(/main\/.+/, `main/${quoteId[0]}/${quoteId[1]}/${quoteId[2]}/${quoteId[3]}/${quoteId[4]}/${quoteId}.md`); includeElement.setAttribute("url", newUrl); } }
